firefox_focus.name: Firefox Focus
firefox_focus.description: Minimal privacy browser with automatic tracking protection and no history storage.

brave.name: Brave Browser
brave.description: Privacy-focused browser with built-in ad and tracker blocking.

duckduckgo_browser.name: DuckDuckGo Browser
duckduckgo_browser.description: Simple private browser with tracker blocking and app tracking protection.

duckduckgo.name: DuckDuckGo
duckduckgo.description: Privacy-focused search engine app with tracker blocking.

startpage.name: Startpage
startpage.description: Private Google proxy search with no tracking.

signal.name: Signal
signal.description: End-to-end encrypted messaging with minimal metadata collection.

session.name: Session
session.description: Anonymous messenger using onion-routing style infrastructure.

authy.name: Authy
authy.description: Multi-device 2FA authenticator with encrypted cloud sync.

1password.name: 1Password
1password.description: Secure password manager with strong encryption and zero-knowledge design.

proton_vpn.name: Proton VPN
proton_vpn.description: No-logs VPN with strong privacy protections and Swiss jurisdiction.

mullvad.name: Mullvad VPN
mullvad.description: Anonymous VPN with no email/account requirement.

cloudflare_1.1.1.1.name: 1.1.1.1 WARP
cloudflare_1.1.1.1.description: Encrypted DNS and optional VPN tunnel for privacy.

standard_notes.name: Standard Notes
standard_notes.description: Encrypted note-taking app with open-source architecture.

obsidian.name: Obsidian
obsidian.description: Local-first note system with markdown vaults.

vlc.name: VLC for Mobile
vlc.description: Open-source media player supporting almost all formats.

pocket_casts.name: Pocket Casts
pocket_casts.description: Privacy-respecting podcast player with no tracking-heavy ads.

apple_privacy_settings.name: iOS Privacy Settings (Built-in)
apple_privacy_settings.description: App tracking control, permission isolation, and privacy reporting built into iOS.

lockdown.description: Local firewall-style blocker using VPN-based filtering.
